## MR: !4954 — Update to main book year instead of latest book year

**Branch:** `main-book-year` → `master`
**URL:** https://gitlab.com/diffinder/dfmain/-/merge_requests/4954

## MR Description

Replace latest_book_year with main_book_year
                                                                                                
  Changes the concept of the "default" book year shown in the client context from the most
  recently created audit engagement's book year to a smarter selection based on the client's
  actual book years:

  - Adds BookYear::main_book_year() logic: returns the latest completed book year (end date in
  the past), falling back to the latest available book year if none are complete yet.
  - Renames latest_book_year → main_book_year throughout the stack (Rust models, TypeScript
  types, and all Svelte pages that consume it).

  This ensures clients are defaulted to a relevant book year, rather than showing the most recent audit engagement.

## MR: !5261 — sql: resolve duplicate version 20221217

**Branch:** `improve-vcr` → `master`
**URL:** https://gitlab.com/diffinder/dfmain/-/merge_requests/5261

## MR Description

`20221217_get_manual_vat_conclusions.sql` and
`20221217_get_acceptance_criteria_history.sql` both used version
prefix 20221217. The soft-migration loader keys on that prefix
(sqlx `_sqlx_migrations.version`), so only one row could ever exist
per version — whichever file loaded second overwrote the first, and
every subsequent startup saw the "winning" file's content as drifted
relative to the recorded checksum, producing the warnings on server
startup.

Renumber the get-side to 20221219 (next free slot; 20221218 is the
sibling `update_manual_vat_conclusions`). Procedure semantics
unchanged.
